concept: Helper / One Who Brings Clarity to the Collective
description: One who offers assistance freely when need arises. A helper contributes to a task or effort, bringing clarity and support to the collective endeavor.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'we' (the collective), 'so' (clarity, light), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'one who brings open clarity to the collective.' This frames a helper not as a subordinate, but as an active contributor who illuminates the path forward for the group.
